name: Retrowave World
short_description: Neon lights, palm trees, synthwave, chrome robot women, speeding 80s supercars... Welcome to Retrowave World!
detailed_description:
If you like Retrowave World



About the Game

Neon lights, palm trees, synthwave, chrome robot women, speeding 80s supercars... Welcome to Retrowave World!

You're driving your 80s supercar, you stop on the side of the road, you get out of your car, you stay standing, your elbow leaning on the door of your car, the breeze of the wind blows in your hair, the smoke from your cigarette rises and scatters towards the sky as you watch this sunset that seems eternal to you... This is the unique nostalgia experience that Retrowave World wants to give to the player. Forget your job, forget the traffic jams, forget your problems... Imagine yourself living in this world filled with neon lights and nostalgia.

When listening to Synthwave / Retrowave / Vaporwave most people have had this feeling of nostalgia for a time that they did not know or that never existed.

The Retrowave is heavily inspired by the 80s, but is above all an idealized futuristic version of the 80s.

Whether you are nostalgic for your childhood, the good old days or simply for a time you have never known, Retrowave World will offer the player the unique experience of being able to be immersed in this wonderful universe for at least a few moments. ..

Alone, with friends or with strangers explore the incredible universe of Retrowave World.

Drive your car through the different worlds, stop at the VHS store to see the latest releases, take a trip to the arcade to try to break the record on your favorite game, go to the Synth Shop to buy the cassette of the latest fashionable group, make deliveries and earn money, challenge other players in ever crazier races... The possibilities are numerous...

Retrowave World offers above all a visual and sound experience that will delight fans of the genre and will surely introduce this wonderful universe to those who do not know it yet...

Features:

🌴 No less than 10 cars!

🌴 More than 5 different universes!

🌴 A unique retro-futuristic atmosphere!

🌴 Over 50 different synthwave music!

🌴 Customize your car!

🌴 Make deliveries and earn money!

🌴 Play your favorite games in the arcade!

🌴 Invest in real estate and earn money with your pensions!

🌴 Check out the different stores and buildings like the VHS Store!

🌴 Pure nostalgia!

supported_languages: English, French, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, German, Czech, Hungarian, Japanese, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Italian, Bulgarian, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Greek, Indonesian, Korean, Norwegian, Romanian, Swedish, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese, Catalan
